content:
1. Generates monthly article summaries (incl. author names) with aggregates; shipped for a demo despite known N+1 scaling flaw.
2. N+1 author fetches; in-memory category filter; naive month-end calc; mutation of input list.
3. Batching authors vs pushing filter to SQL (see "Open" note).
4. Missing authors, DB errors/failures, timezone/datetime edge cases, huge result sets, invalid month/year inputs.
